info.title: Change Request Web Services
info.summary: APIs to manage change request and impact analysis (create, retrieve, patch, approve and reject)

post.description: Creates a new Change Request or subtype of Change Request with elements passed in input. Elements passed in input can only be part of the core part

get.description: Retrieves a Change Request with the required facets. Core part is always retrieved

patch.description: Modify an existing Change Request. Only the elements passed in input are modified. Output will be composed of the core part as well as the modified fields.

post.description: Retrieves and approves the Change Request.
Retrieves and rejects the Change Request.
Creates a new Impact Analysis or subtype of Impact Analysis with elements passed in input. Elements passed in input can only be part of the core part

get.description: Retrieves an Impact Analysis with the required facets. Core part is always retrieved

patch.description: Modify an existing Impact Analysis. Only the elements passed in input are modified. Output will be composed of the core part as well as the modified fields.

get.summary: Gets a list of Change Requests from indexed search
get.description: Gets a list of Change Requests. By default, returns a total of up to 50 items, can be optionally increased upto 1000 items using $top query parameter.Recommendation, Use $searchStr query parameter with a minimum of two characters for better performances.

parameters.name: SecurityContext
parameters.description: Security context the logged in user is using like ctx::VPLMProjectLeader.MyCompany.Default

parameters.name: $searchStr
parameters.description: A search text to find one or more items.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Represents the total number of items returned from the search, accepts a maximum value of 1000.

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Represents the number of items to skip (to be used along with $top query parameter)

200.description: Could be linked with missing security context or licensing

state.description: current state of the Change Request
current state of the Impact Analysis

changeCoordinator.description: full details of a Person can be retrieved using dedicated Web Service /resources/modeler/pno/person/userX

items.description: full details of a Person can be retrieved using dedicated Web Service /resources/modeler/pno/person/userX
full details of a Person can be retrieved using dedicated Web Service /resources/modeler/pno/person/userX
full details of a Group can be retrieved using userGroup URI
full details of a Group can be retrieved using userGroup URI
full details of a Person can be retrieved using dedicated Web Service /resources/modeler/pno/person/userX
One or more SpecializationExtension can be removed from object

value.title: Title of Change Request
value.name: name of Change Request
value.owner: Identifier of the owner of the Change Request

value.title: Title of Impact Analysis
value.name: name of Impact Analysis
value.owner: Identifier of the owner of the Impact Analysis

400KO.description: Identifier passed in input or provided JSON is invalid

401KO.description: Could be linked with missing security context or licensing

403KO.description: Function cannot be executed as a check failed, could be linked with an invalid CSRF token or a system condition unfulfilled

securityContextParameters.name: SecurityContext
securityContextParameters.description: Security context the logged in user is using like ctx::RoleValue.OrganizationValue.CollaborativeSpaceValue

CSRFParameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
CSRFParameters.description: CSRF token could be obtained from a GET or from dedicated web service /resources/v1/application/CSRF

crIdParameters.name: id
crIdParameters.description: The physical id of the Change Request

iaIdParameters.name: pid
iaIdParameters.description: The physical id of the Impact Analysis

crFieldsParameters.name: $fields
crFieldsParameters.description: The parameter allowing retrieval of the Change Request's additional fields. Comma separated list of fields among members, customerAttributes, implementingChanges, answeredIssues, impactAnalysis, affectedItems, reportedAgainst

iaFieldsParameters.name: $fields
iaFieldsParameters.description: The parameter allowing retrieval of the Impact Analysis' additional fields. Comma separated list of fields among members, customerAttributes, impactBasis, impactedItems, implementingChanges
